# Applying a Code

Applying a promotional code at Acme Shop is simple: after adding items to your cart, go to the checkout page, where you will find a "Promo Code" field. Enter the code accurately, noting any case sensitivity, and click "Apply" to see the discount reflected in your order summary if the code is valid. Be aware that promo codes may have specific eligibility criteria such as minimum purchase amounts, exclusions, and expiration dates, so always check the associated terms. If issues arise, such as error messages or technical glitches, contacting customer support is recommended for assistance, as codes cannot typically be combined with other offers and do not cover shipping fees or taxes.
